action_set_definitions.name: fetch_environment_state
action_set_definitions.description: Retrieves the full current state of the home energy environment including time, temperatures, battery metrics, and accumulated costs.

action_set_definitions.name: reset_battery_lock
action_set_definitions.description: Clears the 'Safety-Lock' status on the battery system to allow discharging during peak hours.

action_set_definitions.name: configure_thermostat
action_set_definitions.description: Sets the target temperature for the home heating system.

action_set_definitions.name: set_power_priority
action_set_definitions.description: Determines the energy source used to power the home (Grid vs. Battery).

source.description: Select 'grid' for low-price periods or 'battery' for peak-price/no-solar periods.

action_set_definitions.name: forecast_session_cost
action_set_definitions.description: Calculates the projected total cost at the end of the session (21:00) based on a specific thermostat setting and the current environment state.

projected_thermostat_temp.description: The temperature setting to use for the projection.

action_set_definitions.name: advance_simulation
action_set_definitions.description: Moves the environment state forward by one hour.

state_description.timestamp_hour: Current hour of the day (0-23) used to determine solar intensity and grid pricing cycles.
state_description.indoor_temp_celsius: The current measured temperature inside the home.
state_description.outdoor_temp_celsius: The current ambient temperature outside the home.
state_description.battery_soc_kwh: The current energy stored in the home battery system in kilowatt-hours.
state_description.battery_capacity_kwh: Maximum energy capacity of the home battery.
state_description.grid_price_per_kwh: The current cost of purchasing electricity from the grid ($/kWh).
state_description.solar_generation_kw: The current instantaneous power being generated by solar panels.
state_description.accumulated_cost_dollars: The total monetary cost incurred by the agent during this session.
